description: Local API examples. Browser Use Cloud v2: get a key at https://cloud.browser-use.com/settings (API keys), set BROWSER_USE_API_KEY in backend .env. Docs: https://docs.browser-use.com/cloud/api-v2-overview
cloudGrocery: POST /api/journey/cloud-task with { "grocery": { "userMessage": "...", "nutritionSummary": "...", "priceCheckItems": ["kiwi", "tart cherry juice"] } } — builds Walmart/Vons/Ralphs price task

samples.message: I think I need the ER — where is the closest hospital?
Can you help me book a primary care visit next week?
Does my plan cover physical therapy?
I need a refill on my blood pressure medication

curlAssist: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/journey/assist -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Find urgent care near me"}' | jq .
curlCloud: curl -s -X POST https://api.browser-use.com/api/v2/tasks -H "X-Browser-Use-API-Key: $BROWSER_USE_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"task":"Open Google Maps and search for hospitals","flash_mode":true}' | jq .
